We also offer 24/7 access for premium members.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="Do I need a membership to use the gym?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]Yes, a membership is required to access our facilities. However, we offer day passes and trial sessions for those who want to try before committing.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="What types of fitness classes do you offer?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]We offer a variety of classes, including Yoga, HIIT, Zumba, Strength Training, CrossFit, Pilates, and Spin Classes. Classes are available for all fitness levels.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="Do you provide personal training?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Yes! Our certified personal trainers create customized workout plans tailored to your goals, whether it's weight loss, muscle gain, or endurance training.

[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question=" Is there a separate section for women?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]Yes, we have a women-only workout area with private training spaces and female trainers available upon request.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="Do you offer locker rooms and showers?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]Yes, we have clean and secure locker rooms with showers and changing areas.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][/dipl_faq_page_schema][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][dipl_tilt_image faq_question="What equipment do you have?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]Our gym is equipped with state-of-the-art cardio machines, free weights, resistance machines, squat racks, functional training zones, and more to meet all your fitness needs.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="Do you offer nutrition guidance?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]Yes, we provide personalized nutrition plans and diet consultations to help you optimize your fitness journey.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="Can I freeze or cancel my membership?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]Yes, we allow membership freezing for up to 3 months due to medical or travel reasons. Membership cancellation policies vary based on the plan.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question=" Do you have locker rooms and showers?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]Yes, we offer clean and secure locker rooms, showers, and changing areas for all members. Premium members also get access to sauna and steam rooms.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="How do I sign up?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]You can sign up online through our website or visit our club for a tour and registration. Our team will assist you in choosing the best plan for your needs.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="Do you offer discounts for students or families?" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]Yes! We have special discounts for students, families, and corporate memberships.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][/dipl_faq_page_schema][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][dipl_button admin_label="Join Now" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" hover_enabled="0" global_colors_info="{}" sticky_enabled="0"][dipl_button_item button_text="Join Now" background_fill_style="slide_left_fill" button_bg_color="#d99c79" button_alignment="center" button_use_icon="on" button_icon="||fa||900" button_on_hover="off" button_custom_padding="10px|40px|10px|40px|true|true" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" button_font="Playfair Display||||||||" button_text_color="#FFFFFF" hover_enabled="0" global_colors_info="{}" button_bg_color__hover_enabled="on|hover" button_bg_color__hover="#a63838" button_bg_enable_color__hover="on" sticky_enabled="0"][/dipl_button_item][/dipl_button][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
